ideation: This sequence depicts a robot carefully holding out a coin.  The animation will focus on a smooth, deliberate movement of one arm to present the coin, while the other arm remains relatively static for balance. The robot's attention is focused on the exchange. Frame 1 begins with both arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the right arm beginning to extend, slightly outward and upward, as if preparing to offer the coin. Frame 3 shows the right arm fully extended, presenting the coin, the wrist angled to show the coin clearly. Frame 4 shows the right arm slightly retracting, as if the coin has been received. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to a neutral position.  Each frame includes specific joint angles to create a natural flow. The left arm remains relatively still to enhance the focus on the coin-offering gesture.

frames.beat: both arms hang at rest, ready for the exchange
the right arm begins to extend, offering the coin
the right arm fully extends, presenting the coin clearly
the right arm retracts slightly, the coin received
both arms return to a neutral, resting position
